relations.note: Describes specific parameters of the main callout variant within the overall visual system.
Describes specific parameters of the secondary callout variant within the overall visual system.
Describes specific parameters of the text-heavy callout variant within the overall visual system.

quotes: three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Maintain visual hierarchy and prevent layout clutter from competing visual elements.
rules.rule_text: Never compete two callouts of the same style on the same screen or section. Choose exactly one of the three approved styles (Main key point, Secondary data, or Text-heavy) per focal area.

quotes: Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below

1. **Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]

rules.intent: Define structure, padding, and coloration for the primary callout component.
rules.rule_text: The Main callout style uses centered bold Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) text bracketed by Gold (callout.main.rule_color = #ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below. The rules must be 2px in weight, span roughly 60–100% of the text block width, and have 16px of vertical padding separating them from the text.

quotes: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue text
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.

2. **Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

rules.intent: Standardize the appearance and internal padding of the secondary data callout box.
rules.rule_text: The Secondary/data callout features a Light Blue (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9) box background with a 70% tint (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) and bold Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) text. It contains 20px of internal padding and utilizes the accent box corner radius (radius.callout.icon_box_container = 40px 8px 40px 8px). It may optionally include a single line icon.

quotes: Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text
24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.

3. **Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

rules.intent: Preserve precise color mappings and layout logic for complex, multi-level information callouts.
rules.rule_text: The Text-heavy callout uses a Golden Sand (color.tertiary.golden_sand = #FEF1C8) box background at 30% tint (opacity.callout.golden_sand_box = 0.3) with 24px internal padding (padding.section.side = 24px). It must contain a bold Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) headline, line icons, bold Sky Blue (color.secondary.sky_blue = #358CCB) subheads, and regular Graphite (color.tertiary.graphite = #212121) body text. On mobile viewpoints, the desktop two-column icon+text layout must collapse into a single column.
